Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Changelog:
Features:
 -Added auto detection rules for SimpleBingo (Thank you Asuna for the rules!). You can still select to manually input your rules for bingo but auto rules will update every 1 minute so everyone can see how much is in the pot at all times.
